name: Vaca Valley Travel Center
description: Independent 24-hour truck stop near the I-80/I-505 interchange (Leisure Town Rd exit) with a Chevron fuel island, diesel lanes, Burger King and Blimpie, driver showers and truck parking.

name: Cordelia Truck Scales (Commercial Vehicle Enforcement Facility)
description: Caltrans/CHP westbound I-80 commercial-vehicle inspection and weigh station southwest of Fairfield with static and dynamic scales, PrePass, and an adjacent rest area/truck parking area; a replacement facility broke ground in 2025.

name: Hunter Hill Rest Area (Westbound)
description: Caltrans westbound I-80 rest area near mile marker 34 (about 2 miles west of Exit 36, American Canyon Rd) east of Vallejo, with restrooms, drinking water, and auto/truck parking.

name: North Bay Truck Center
description: Established commercial heavy-duty truck and trailer repair shop in Fairfield near I-80 offering diagnostics, mechanical repair and tire service.

name: A & T Road Service
description: 24/7 mobile roadside truck, trailer and tire repair service based in Fairfield covering the I-80 corridor.

name: Sacramento 49er Travel Plaza
description: Full-service independent travel plaza (Pilot diesel dealer #879) at the West El Camino Ave exit with 275 truck parking spaces, restaurant, showers, laundry, repair shop, truck wash and certified/CAT scale.

name: West Sac Truck Stop
description: Independent ARCO-branded truck stop (Ramos Oil cardlock) just off the West Capitol Ave exit offering diesel, roughly 30 truck parking spaces, ATM, convenience store and restrooms.

name: Ramos Oil Co (Shell/CFN)
description: 24-hour Shell/CFN cardlock fuel and mini-mart at the SR-113 exit with diesel lanes, DEF, deli, certified scales and truck parking.

name: CAT Scale at Ramos Oil Co (Dixon)
description: Certified CAT Scale on-site at the Ramos Oil Co Shell/CFN travel center at I-80 Exit 66 (SR-113) in Dixon — the nearest CAT Scale to the Bay Area/Vacaville corridor.

name: Pacific Pride (Roseville)
description: Pacific Pride cardlock (AFI-CA934) near the Riverside Ave exit offering diesel and overnight truck parking, not a full-service truck stop.

name: Sacramento 49er Travel Plaza CAT Scale
description: Certified CAT Scale on-site at the Sacramento 49er Travel Plaza at the West El Camino Ave exit of I-80.

name: CAT Scale at Maverik #654
description: CAT Scale #3390 located at the Maverik #654 fuel station off I-80 in West Sacramento.

name: Sacramento 49er Truck Wash
description: On-site truck and trailer wash (interior/exterior, engine wash, spray wax, detailing) at the Sacramento 49er Travel Plaza, West El Camino Ave exit.

name: Antelope Weigh Station
description: Caltrans/CHP commercial vehicle enforcement (weigh) station on I-80 near Antelope/Sacramento at about milepost 99, serving eastbound and westbound trucks with PrePass.

name: Sacramento 49er Motel
description: On-site motel at the Sacramento 49er Travel Plaza with adjacent large truck parking lot at the West El Camino Ave exit of I-80.

name: A Plus Truck Repair
description: 24/7 mobile semi-truck and trailer repair based in West Sacramento serving the I-80 corridor including the Antelope weigh station area.

name: Radial Tire Center
description: 24-hour commercial truck tire roadside assistance (flat repair and replacement) serving West Sacramento, Sacramento and Davis along I-80.

name: Lucky's Travel Plaza & Chevron
description: 24-hour I-80 travel plaza in Cisco Grove with a Chevron fuel island, diesel, an attached Subway, restrooms, and a lower overflow lot used for truck parking.

name: Sierra Superstop 13
description: Independent Sierra-Energy fuel stop off I-80 at Dutch Flat offering diesel, a store and deli, propane, and roughly ten truck parking spaces.

name: Donner Pass Commercial Vehicle Enforcement Facility (Truckee Scales)
description: CHP-operated westbound I-80 commercial vehicle weigh and inspection station east of Truckee, staffed 24/7; overnight truck parking is not permitted.

name: Gold Run Rest Area (Eastbound)
description: Caltrans eastbound safety roadside rest area near Gold Run (Exit 144) with restrooms, drinking water, and parking heavily used by long-haul truck drivers.

name: Gold Run Rest Area (Westbound)
description: Caltrans westbound safety roadside rest area near mile 143 (about 0.5 mi west of Gold Run Exit 144) with restrooms, water, and truck-used parking.

name: McCrary's Mobile Tire (I-80 Tire Service)
description: 24/7 mobile commercial-tire repair and replacement service based on the I-80 mountain corridor covering Auburn to Truckee.
